commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: Pre-test of ATM-410 zfs
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: Pre-test of ATM-410 zfs

This is for test only.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=large-scale,large-scale,large-scale,large-scale,large-scale,large-scale,large-scale,large-scale,large-scale,large-scale,\
mds-survey,mds-survey,mds-survey,mds-survey,mds-survey,mds-survey,mds-survey,mds-survey,mds-survey,mds-survey,\
sanity-benchmark,sanity-benchmark,sanity-benchmark,sanity-benchmark,sanity-benchmark,sanity-benchmark,sanity-benchmark,sanity-benchmark,sanity-benchmark,sanity-benchmark, \
clientdistro=el7 serverdistro=el7 osscount=1 ostcount=7 mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 ostsizegb=8 mdssizegb=3 ostfilesystemtype=zfs mdtfilesystemtype=zfs

Change-Id: Idc552fb73d432b6c89846430b8e87f2839d620fa
Signed-off-by: Jim Casper <jamesx.casper@intel.com>
